AccessUI.description: Grants permission to access the MLflow UI

CreateExperiment.description: Grants permission to create an MLflow experiment

CreateModelVersion.description: Grants permission to create a new model version

CreateRegisteredModel.description: Grants permission to create a registered model

CreateRun.description: Grants permission to create a new run within an experiment

DeleteExperiment.description: Grants permission to mark an MLflow experiment for deletion

DeleteLoggedModel.description: Grants permission to delete a logged model in MLflow

DeleteLoggedModelTag.description: Grants permission to delete a tag for a logged model in MLflow

DeleteModelVersion.description: Grants permission to delete a model version

DeleteModelVersionTag.description: Grants permission to delete a model version tag

DeleteRegisteredModel.description: Grants permission to delete a registered model

DeleteRegisteredModelAlias.description: Grants permission to delete a registered model alias

DeleteRegisteredModelTag.description: Grants permission to delete a registered model tag

DeleteRun.description: Grants permission to mark a run for deletion

DeleteTag.description: Grants permission to delete a tag on a run

DeleteTraceTag.description: Grants permission to delete a trace tag in MLflow

DeleteTraces.description: Grants permission to delete traces in MLflow

EndTrace.description: Grants permission to end a trace in MLflow

FinalizeLoggedModel.description: Grants permission to set status for a logged model in MLflow

GetDownloadURIForModelVersionArtifacts.description: Grants permission to get a URI to download model artifacts for a specific model version

GetExperiment.description: Grants permission to get metadata for an MLflow experiment

GetExperimentByName.description: Grants permission to get metadata for an MLflow experiment by name

GetLatestModelVersions.description: Grants permission to get the latest model versions

GetLoggedModel.description: Grants permission to get a logged model in MLflow

GetMetricHistory.description: Grants permission to get a list of all values for the specified metric for a given run

GetModelVersion.description: Grants permission to get a model version by model name and version

GetModelVersionByAlias.description: Grants permission to get model version by alias in MLflow

GetRegisteredModel.description: Grants permission to get a registered model

GetRun.description: Grants permission to get metadata, metrics, parameters, and tags for a run

GetTraceInfo.description: Grants permission to get information about a trace in MLflow

ListArtifacts.description: Grants permission to list artifacts for a run

ListLoggedModelArtifacts.description: Grants permission to list artifacts for a logged model in MLflow

LogBatch.description: Grants permission to log a batch of metrics, parameters, and tags for a run

LogInputs.description: Grants permission to log inputs for a run

LogLoggedModelParams.description: Grants permission to log params for a logged model in MLflow

LogMetric.description: Grants permission to log a metric for a run

LogModel.description: Grants permission to log the model associated with a run

LogOutputs.description: Grants permission to log outputs, such as models, for a run in MLflow

LogParam.description: Grants permission to log a parameter tracked during a run

RenameRegisteredModel.description: Grants permission to rename a registered model

RestoreExperiment.description: Grants permission to restore an experiment marked for deletion

RestoreRun.description: Grants permission to restore a deleted run

SearchExperiments.description: Grants permission to search for MLflow experiments

SearchLoggedModels.description: Grants permission to search for logged models in MLflow

SearchModelVersions.description: Grants permission to search for a model version

SearchRegisteredModels.description: Grants permission to search for registered models in MLflow

SearchRuns.description: Grants permission to search for runs that satisfy expressions

SearchTraces.description: Grants permission to search for traces in MLflow

SetExperimentTag.description: Grants permission to set a tag on an experiment

SetLoggedModelTags.description: Grants permission to set tags for a logged model in MLflow

SetModelVersionTag.description: Grants permission to set a tag for the model version

SetRegisteredModelAlias.description: Grants permission to set a registered model alias

SetRegisteredModelTag.description: Grants permission to set a tag for a registered model

SetTag.description: Grants permission to set a tag on a run

SetTraceTag.description: Grants permission to set a trace tag in MLflow

StartTrace.description: Grants permission to start a trace in MLflow

TransitionModelVersionStage.description: Grants permission to transition a model version to a particular stage

UpdateExperiment.description: Grants permission to update the metadata for an MLflow experiment

UpdateModelVersion.description: Grants permission to update the model version

UpdateRegisteredModel.description: Grants permission to update a registered model

UpdateRun.description: Grants permission to update run metadata

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag key and value pair
